testInfo.summary: Pre-flight checks will validate the mTLS certificate before requesting an access token using the Directory client_id provided in the test configuration. After that, it will also generate an SSA using the Open Insurance Brasil Directory. Additionally, it will validate that other fields have been provided on the test config.
